video_title: The Life List | Official Trailer | Netflix
comment_text:
I stumbled upon this movie on netflix and watched the movie without seeing the trailer or reading description or doing any research whatsoever. I loved it, i absolutely loved it, every second of it. I have been going through a lot, everything feels painful, this movie felt like a warm hug in the middle of a storm. I could relate to our dear protagonist Alex, and she was so sweet so kind, reminded me to not let go of my kindness my softness because of how the world treats you, to be myself, love myself and love life. I dont care if i went overboard with this but i actually wrote A LIFE LIST for myself midway through the movie, and i hope i tick off everything(atleast most things) on that list as life goes on. I’d surely rewatch it whenever i want to feel good about life.

(PS: though wouldn’t recommend cheating on your partner)
